SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. - PLAINTIFF EDWARD RICHARDSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM.. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. VICTORIA LARSON, COUNSEL WITH LAWYERS COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHT OF SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA IS PRESENT FOR THE SOLE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING PLAINTIFF ACCESS TO ZOOM APPEARANCES. NO LEGAL ASSISTANCE IF PROVIDED BY VICTORIA LARSON ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE FOLLOWING RELATED CASES ARE HEARD SIMULTANEOUSLY WITH THIS MATTER: CSM-21-864062 - EDWARD RICHARDSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS; CSM-21-864066 - JAYSON HILL VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS; CSM-21-864075 - AARON JUSTIN VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS; CSM-21-864076 - THOMAS BLUE VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS. JAYSON HILL TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFFS PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PLAINTIFFS IN THE RELATED CASES. WITNESS LARRY STRINGER, INTERIM MANAGER FOR HEALTHY STREETS OPERATIONS CENTER/ (RETRIED) DEPUTY DIRECTOR OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. WITNESS DEBRA MESKAN, ENCAMPMENT RESOLUTION TEAM LEAD, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-18-2021)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, **SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION** PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
